allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "placeholder|Replace with|emoji|👨|👤|📚|🏫|img src" -AllMatches | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333/faculty" -UseBasicParsing; $content = $r.Content; $imgs = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'src="\([^"]+\)"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Where-Object { $_ -match 'images' }; $imgs; $placeholders = [regex]::Matches\($content, 'placeholder-img|Replace with|Faculty Photo'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; if \($placeholders.Count -gt 0\) { "PLACEHOLDERS FOUND: $\($placeholders -join ', '\)" } else { "No placeholders found" })

PowerShell($pages = @\("/about", "/gallery", "/rankers", "/branches", "/courses", "/contact"\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333$p" -UseBasicParsing; $ph = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'placeholder-img|Replace with|Faculty Photo|Students Studying|Founder image'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; if \($ph.Count -gt 0\) { "$p : PLACEHOLDERS: $\($ph -join ', '\)" } else { "$p : OK" } })
